metadata.description: General-purpose Claude Code skills for Drupal development and everyday coding workflows.

plugins.name: drupal-dev
plugins.description: General-purpose Drupal development skills: an iterative phpcs/phpstan quality loop, codebase architecture analysis, and deprecation scanning ahead of major-version upgrades.

plugins.name: dev-general
plugins.description: Workflow skills that aren't tied to any framework: a sticky teach-as-you-go mode for narrated coding, and a session miner that finds repetitive work worth turning into skills.
